title: Kleeva
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Kleeva.jpg]] |name=Kleeva |region=*[[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector= |system=[[Kleeva system/Legends|Kleeva system]]''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' |coordinates=R-11 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons=*[[Boonda's Moon]] *[[Vultee-Pietsch]]''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' {{C|Poster}} *At least 1 other [[Moon/Legends|moon]] |routes=[[Oktos Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Gas giant/Legends|Gas giant]] |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Poison/Legends|Poisonous]] |climate= |gravity= |terrain=[[Color/Legends|Violet]] [[Cloud/Legends|clouds]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population=None |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|When do we reach Kleeva's third moon?''"
"''Twenty minutes, sir.|[[Groot]] and [[Pelvin]]|}} '''Kleeva''' was a massive [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located within [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by at least three [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Boonda's Moon]] and [[Vultee-Pietsch]]. ==Appearances== *[[Droids (1995) 3|''Droids'' (1995) 3]] {{1st}} *[[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' (1995) 4]] *''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' {{1stID|Kleeva}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kleeva}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kleeva }} [[Category:Gas giants]] [[Category:Kleeva system locations]] [[Category:Planets in Hutt Space]]
